data.body: We did it! A missing piece of Upton Heath in Dorset has been saved from mineral extraction and secured as an important ecological corridor within the Upton Heath SSSI. Sand Lizards, Smooth Snakes, Dartford Warblers, invertebrates et al have a brighter future. Thanks to everyone who chipped in!
